name: E-read Codespace
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && python3 -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt'
postStartCommand: bash -lc 'for port in 8000 5173; do pid=$(lsof -t -i:$port -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$pid" ]; then kill -9 $pid || true; fi; done; cd backend && nohup .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 > backend-dev.log 2> backend-dev.err.log < /dev/null & cd ../frontend && nohup npm run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173 --strictPort > frontend-dev.log 2> frontend-dev.err.log < /dev/null &'
